caption: A man with grey hair and a fair complexion is centered in the frame against a plain, light-colored wall. He is wearing a black crew-neck shirt and has a thin black wire, possibly from an earpiece, running down his chest. In the upper center of the scene, the text "Tiger-TV" is visible. To his right, a small blue and white object sits on a surface. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, his mouth opening and closing. By the final frame, he raises both hands into the shot to gesture; his right hand is partially visible, while his left hand is open with fingers spread, revealing a ring on his ring finger. The camera remains stationary throughout, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the man as he communicates.
